title: Random World Blocks
description: Random World Blocs is a chaotic Minecraft mod that replaces the terrain around you with completely random blocks as you explore. Every step transforms your world into a colorful mess of possibilities — from diamonds to dirt, obsidian to cake.
body:
Random World Blocs brings pure chaos and fun to Minecraft by randomly replacing blocks around you as you walk.

🔹 Dynamic Randomization – Every time you approach new chunks, the surrounding blocks are swapped with random ones from the game. \
🔹 Performance-Friendly – Only nearby blocks are randomized to keep gameplay smooth. \
🔹 Player-Friendly – Player-placed blocks remain untouched, so your builds stay safe. \
🔹 Full Block Coverage – Almost every block type can appear, from rare ores to decorative blocks (even leaves and other unusual blocks!). \
🔹 Custom Exclusions – Special blocks like end portal frames are protected from replacement.

Perfect for challenge runs, chaotic survival worlds, or just to see your favorite seed in a whole new light!

Installation:

Install Minecraft Forge (compatible version).

Download Random World Blocs and place it in your mods folder.

Launch the game and prepare for chaos!

Note: This mod works with existing worlds — but be ready for surprises when you explore!

[![Available on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20on-CurseForge-f16436?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/random-world-blocks)
